ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,Owner.License_type__c !='Partner Community' ,ISCHANGED(OwnerId) ,NOT(INCLUDES(Owner.fxUserExtraAttributes__c , "7010-Dynamic OBC Tag")) ,OR( NOT(CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c))) ,AND( CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) ) ,AND( LEFT(OwnerId,3)='005' ,TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c)!= TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) )
) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_087: The New Owner does not have the same tag as the Opportunity, or, the Opportunity is TBD/Blank. As needed, please pick a different user, or ask GCE to perform special owner transfers
